pain_points.signal: Persistent technical issues: messages fail to send, app hangs, lags, calls not disconnecting, connection instability.
Notifications not working consistently on mobile, especially Android, causing missed messages.
App updates introduce new bugs, break existing features, and make the app unstable or unusable.
UI/UX problems: small fonts, poor color contrast, confusing interface, steep learning curve.
Lack of parity between mobile app and web/desktop version (missing features, reduced functionality).
Frustration with AI features or irrelevant distractions that hinder productivity.
Difficulties in basic functions: commenting (cursor issues, missing fields), submitting tickets, viewing content.

desired_outcomes.outcome: Reliable, stable app performance with consistent notifications and message delivery.
Seamless functionality parity between mobile and desktop/web versions.
Improved mobile UI/UX: intuitive design, better readability, no missing buttons or fields.
Ability to effectively collaborate on mobile: comment on tickets, manage tasks, view dashboards fully.
Optimized for various connection strengths and mobile devices (e.g., foldable phones).
